verified.notes: Maine has multiple HCBS waivers with different eligibility criteria. Asset limits provided are for the Elderly and Adults with Disabilities Waiver (0276.R06.00) as of 2026. Age requirements vary by waiver program (e.g., 65+ for elderly waiver, 18+ for ID/autism waivers, 21-64 for other disabilities waiver). Income limits not found in provided sources. A new Lifespan Waiver is launching July 2026 that will consolidate multiple programs. Recommend consulting Maine DHHS directly for complete eligibility details for the specific waiver program of interest.

programs.programName: State Health Insurance Assistance Program (SHIP) - Maine Senior Health Insurance Assistance Program

verified.notes: Program has no minimum age requirement; eligibility is for Medicare beneficiaries (age 65+ or disabled younger), free counseling with no income/assets test

programs.programName: Maine Legal Services for the Elderly

verified.notes: Program is officially named 'Legal Services for Maine Elders, Inc.' Age requirement is clearly documented as 60+. Income and asset limits are not specified in available sources; program serves 'socially and economically needy elderly' but specific thresholds are not publicly stated. Phone number confirmed from official Maine DHHS source.
